penalties.description: Task not completed within maximum time - return transfers incomplete

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models agreed that the task was incomplete within the 225-second timeframe, triggering the incomplete_task penalty which results in automatic zero score per FLS rubric. Claude detected partial return transfers while GPT did not, but both confirmed the task was not completed.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's observation of partial return transfers beginning is consistent with the incomplete task finding and provides more complete phase detection
Incomplete task penalty should equal maximum time (300 seconds) per FLS rubric, making GPT's calculation correct
